Request Diagnosis

Diagnosis Scopes & Pricing

All engagements begin with independent diagnosis. Execution is optional and secondary.

Core Offering

Paid Media System Diagnosis

I determine whether paid media performance survives contact with revenue, sales behavior, attribution reality, and economic constraints.

Diagnostic Scopes

Campaign System Diagnosis
Evaluates account structure, tracking integrity, and spend efficiency within a single platform (Google or Meta)
$1,250
Cross-Channel System Diagnosis
Evaluates how multiple platforms interact, attribute outcomes, and distort reported performance (Google + Meta + GA4)
$2,500–$3,500
Revenue System Diagnosis
Extends verification into call data and CRM outcomes to confirm whether advertising performance survives downstream reality
$5,000–$7,500

You're buying depth of truth, not platform count.

What You Receive

A written evaluation with waste quantified in dollars. A video walkthrough at executive level, not platform tutorial. A "Do / Stop / Fix First" list ranked by business impact. And a conservative recovery range based on evidence, not hype.

Who commissions this work

Operators who suspect something's wrong but can't prove it. Founders exposed to payroll when ads underperform. COOs and VPs of Marketing who need performance data that survives board review. CFOs before budget reallocation decisions. The pressure is always the same: are we getting business outcomes or just dashboard activity?

Hard Rule: Money-Back Guarantee

If the diagnosis does not identify at least its fee in actionable inefficiency, the engagement is refunded in full.

Post-Diagnosis Only

Post-Diagnosis Execution Support (Optional)

Execution support is only available after diagnosis and only when structural corrections are required. This is not an agency relationship. It is implementation of what the diagnosis exposed.

Pricing

Foundational
Single-platform, single-location
$3,000/mo
Professional
Multi-location or multi-platform
$5,000/mo
Enterprise
High-complexity, multiple channels
$7,500–$8,000/mo

Who commissions this work

Teams who know what's wrong and need execution without agency conflicts. Multi-location operators who can't afford attribution errors. The question after diagnosis: fix internally, fire the agency, or bring in independent execution?

Post-Diagnosis

Post-Diagnosis Capability Transfer

Designed for organizations that need internal ownership after inefficiencies are identified. The goal is to build your capability, not create dependency.

In-Housing Transition

Complete knowledge transfer, process documentation, and team training

$15,000

Team Training

Hands-on workshop covering platform fundamentals and operational discipline

$5,000

Ongoing Advisory

Strategic guidance for in-house teams (used sparingly)

$250/hr

Who commissions this work

Leaders who want to own the capability, not rent it. The question: do we control this or stay dependent? In-housing isn't always appropriate. When it is, we build the capability and step back.

Key Differentiator

My objective is to build your internal capability, even when that reduces or eliminates the need for ongoing support.

Capability transfer is designed to preserve control, ownership, and decision integrity. No vendor lock-in. No manufactured dependency.

Start with Diagnosis

Request a diagnosis. No sales call. No agency pitch.

Request Diagnosis
BUT DID YOU WIN

Independent paid media auditor delivering verdicts, not pitches.
